title: Computer Science
recommendedTrackSummary: ACS-DTA/MRP is the current closest Green River transfer path for this degree because it matches 5 of the 6 degree-specific Green River classes currently tracked for this major.
whyThisTrack: ACS-DTA/MRP has the strongest direct overlap with the current degree-specific Green River class list, including ENGL& 101, MATH& 151, MATH& 152, MATH& 163, plus 1 more.

This auto-match compares every hardcoded course in the current Green River transfer tracks against the major's tracked Green River classes and keeps the track with the highest concrete course overlap.
Use the remaining major-specific checklist items to add the classes that ACS-DTA/MRP does not cover by itself.

supportLists.listTitle: Allen School CE-approved Natural Science course list
sourceEvidenceLines: Physics 116 *and* Physics 119 – generally from AP credit. If you have not taken science, PHYS 121 is recommended as Phys 116 is the 3rd course in a series.
